task_completion.description: Open the draft document in a word processor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for LibreOffice Writer (or a similar word processor) open with the document 'crystal_crypt_draft.odt' loaded.

task_completion.description: Change the page size to 6.00 x 9.00 inches.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Page Style' dialog (Page tab) showing Format Width set to 6.00" and Height set to 9.00", or the document canvas visibly reflecting a 6x9 aspect ratio.

task_completion.description: Set mirrored margins with specific dimensions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Page Style' dialog (Page tab) showing Page Layout set to 'Mirrored', with Inner margin at 0.80", Outer margin at 0.50", and Top/Bottom margins at 0.60".

Look for a left (even-numbered) page header containing a Page Number field aligned to the left and the text 'The Crystal Crypt' aligned to the center. Also look for 'Same content on left and right pages' being unchecked in the Header settings.
Look for a right (odd-numbered) page header containing a Chapter Name field aligned to the center and a Page Number field aligned to the right.

task_completion.description: Save the formatted document as a new file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog saving the file as 'crystal_crypt_print_ready.odt' in /home/ga/Documents/, or the main window title bar updating to show 'crystal_crypt_print_ready.odt'.

integrity.description: The agent used the word processor GUI to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interactions with LibreOffice Writer's menus, dialogs, and toolbars rather than terminal commands or scripts modifying the ODT file directly.

integrity.description: The agent used the software's header feature rather than typing text at the top of the body.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the agent activating the Header area (usually indicated by a blue 'Header' tag or boundary line) and inserting dynamic fields (Page Number, Chapter Name) rather than manually typing numbers or chapter names in the main text area.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Input file: /home/ga/Documents/crystal_crypt_draft.odt. Output file: /home/ga/Documents/crystal_crypt_print_ready.odt. Book Title: 'The Crystal Crypt'. Expected Page Size: 6.0 x 9.0 inches. Expected Margins: Mirrored (Inner: 0.8", Outer: 0.5", Top/Bottom: 0.6").
